sections.heading: Education
items: Ph.D. in Mass Communications, Pennsylvania State University, USA (2004)
M.A. in Journalism, National Chengchi University, Taiwan (1996)
Bachelor of Laws, National Taiwan University, Taiwan (1993)

sections.heading: Experiences
items: 2015.8–Present: Professor, Graduate Institute of Journalism, National Taiwan University
2012.8–2015.7: Director, Graduate Institute of Journalism, National Taiwan University
2008.8–2015.7: Associate Professor, Graduate Institute of Journalism, National Taiwan University
2005.8–2008.7: Assistant Professor, Graduate Institute of Journalism, National Taiwan University
2004.8–2005.7: Assistant Professor, Department of Communication Arts, Fu Jen Catholic University
1999–2000: Political Reporter, Taipei Times and Liberty Times
1997–1999: Reporter and Editor, Wealth Magazine
1996–1997: Political Reporter, Taiwan Daily

sections.heading: Awards and Honors
items: 2011: National Science Council International Research Grant
2010–2011: Fulbright Exchange Scholar Grant
2003: Top student paper in communication technology section, International Communications Association
2003: Second place, student paper competition, Pacific Telecommunications Council
2000: Public scholarship, Ministry of Education, Taiwan
1999: Ambassadorial Scholarship, Rotary Foundation
